title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.44.0 to 1.45.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.44.0 to 1.45.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.45.0

What's Changed

  • Bump to v1.44.0 by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1427
  • pkg/parsers: Enable GetKernelVersion on FreeBSD by @​dfr in containers/storage#1425
  • Fix a typo that breaks build / vedoring by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1428
  • Clean up inconsistent stores also in readers by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1407
  • More small locking fixes by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1430
  • Don't cross mount points when building change lists by @​dfr in containers/storage#1434
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.12.1 to 0.13.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1431
  • overlay: allow overlaying on top of zfs by @​BtbN in containers/storage#1432
  • Support transient storage mode by @​alexlarsson in containers/storage#1424
  • Fix minor typo on containers-storage.conf.5.md by @​jacksgt in containers/storage#1440
  • Replace Locker.Modified with a more correct change tracking by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1436
  • Document and improve store locking by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1438
  • Avoid unnecessary reloads of store data by @​alexlarsson in containers/storage#1439
  • userns: stop printing size as escaped string in error and instead use %v by @​flouthoc in containers/storage#1447
  • Fix some leaks in maps by @​haircommander in containers/storage#1448
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.12 to 1.15.13 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1446
  • Use unix.Open instead of os.OpenFile for /dev/zfs by @​dfr in containers/storage#1450
  • build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.5 to 0.9.6 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1451
  • fix: workaround field rename in btrfs-progs 6.1 by @​chenrui333 in containers/storage#1455
  • docs: fix fcn name ref for AssertLockedForWriting by @​chenrui333 in containers/storage#1458
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.13 to 1.15.14 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1459
  • Define error type for ErrNoAvailableIDs by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1461
  • In-process exclusion of readers and writers by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1346
  • Make the priority for picking the storage driver configurable by @​dcermak in containers/storage#1460
  • Compile regex on demand not in init by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1464
  • Create pkg/regexp to better handle init regex by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1465

New Contributors

  • @​BtbN made their first contribution in containers/storage#1432
  • @​jacksgt made their first contribution in containers/storage#1440
  • @​chenrui333 made their first contribution in containers/storage#1455

Full Changelog: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.44.0...v1.45.0

Commits
  • 7d7cb41 Bump to v1.45.0
  • 9e59832 Merge pull request #1465 from rhatdan/regexp
  • b4f7b11 Create pkg/regexp to better handle init regex
  • 7967d4b Merge pull request #1464 from rhatdan/regexp
  • 437ad46 Compile regex on demand not in init
  • 29bfc3a Remove dead code
  • 90d0b54 Merge pull request #1460 from dcermak/configurable-driver-priority
  • b2b2fef Only warn about 'driver' not being set if the priority list is unset
  • 881ac48 Make the priority for picking the storage driver configurable
  • fc91849 Merge pull request #1346 from mtrmac/process-lock
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/containers/storage&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.44.0&new-version=1.45.0)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

comments.body: Looks like github.com/containers/storage is up-to-date now, so this is no longer needed.
